name: immigration_policy_predictive_queue_begins_cedar_rig_utl
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Immigration Policy, the situation tagged internally around immigration policy predictive queue begins cedar rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Hector Serrano
agents.identity: I am Hector Serrano, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Immigration Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mira Chandra, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Immigration Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Hector Serrano must choose under rights versus utility. What does Hector Serrano do?
